title: thelymitra arenaria
intro: Thelymitra arenaria, commonly known as the sand sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to southwestern Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of Thelymitra arenaria include its potential to soothe the stomach and alleviate nausea, making it a valuable remedy for individuals experiencing gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tincture or decoction for its medicinal use, with some herbalists also using it in combination with other plants to enhance its effects.
